rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petitioners First Second Third And Fourth Causes Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 1. RESPONDENTS JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA and VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA's Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Petitioner's First, Second, Third And Fourth Causes Of Action is continued to March 3, 2021 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 1. RESPONDENTS JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA and VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA'S Notice Of Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to March 3, 2021 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BRYANT FU ET AL VS. TINA YAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT STELLA CHEN'S DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to March 5, 2021 for parties to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the demurrer no later than February 19, 2021 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RAJEEV SHEGAL ET AL VS. FOREST CITY RESIDENRIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Defendants Supplemental Expert Disclosure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 3. Plaintiff's Motion To Strike Defendants' Supplemental Expert Disclosure is OFF CALENDAR, Notice of Settlement on file. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2046 FILBERT, LLC VS. PEGGY BARTEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 4. INTERVENOR DAVID BARTEL'S Notice Of Motion For Leave To Intervene is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party may file its motion to Expunge Lis Pendens. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TAUBE OM, LP VS. DUKE BRYANT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 9, 2021 line 5. DEFENDANT DUKE BRYANT'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. =(501/CFH)
